justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent engaged in multiple avoidable round-trips by repeatedly asking the user for new times without offering alternatives.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's inability to offer alternative times, leading to a repetitive and unproductive exchange.
